# ForcePilot AI

ForcePilot AI is a premium, high-fidelity AI-powered Salesforce mock interview and interview intelligence platform. It provides interactive, adaptive, real-time audio and text mock interview simulations designed specifically for Salesforce developers, administrators, architects, and consultants.

---

## Core Interview Domains

### 1. Salesforce Admin
Focuses on declarative administration, data sharing model (OWD, sharing rules, profiles, permission sets), security configuration, standard object relationships, reporting/dashboards, user management, and enterprise app setup.

### 2. Apex (Asynchronous & Core Development)
Deep dive into programmatic Salesforce engineering. Covers Apex classes, OOP design patterns, asynchronous Apex (Queueable, Batchable, Schedulable, Future methods), custom exceptions, testing strategies, mock frameworks, and performance profiling.

### 3. Apex Triggers
Focuses on writing scalable, bulkified, and modern programmatic database logic. Covers trigger events, trigger context variables, handler frameworks, recursion control, best practices, and integration with declarative automation.

### 4. Lightning Web Components (LWC)
Covers modern Salesforce front-end development. Includes component lifecycle hooks, reactive properties (`@track`, `@api`), Wire service vs. imperative Apex, parent-child communication (CustomEvents), Lightning Message Service (LMS), performance optimizations, and security (Lightning Locker/LWS).

### 5. Salesforce Flow Automation
Covers enterprise declarative orchestration. Evaluates Screen Flows, Record-Triggered Flows, Schedule-Triggered Flows, Autolaunched Flows, subflows, loop optimization, bulkification patterns, custom Apex Actions, and flow error handling.

### 6. Governor Limits
Evaluates architectural knowledge of multi-tenant environments. Includes SOQL limit (100 synchronous / 200 asynchronous), DML limit (150 statements / 10,000 records), CPU time limit (10,000ms), heap size limit, and strategies for avoiding LimitExceptions (e.g. bulkification, async processing).

### 7. Scenario-Based & Technical Architecture Interviews
Integrates real-world system design challenges, data migrations, integration patterns (REST/SOAP, Pub/Sub API, Event-Driven Architecture), single sign-on (SSO), OAuth flows, multi-org strategy, and large data volumes (LDV) strategies.

---

## AI Interview Evaluation & Analytics

- **Adaptive Recruiter-Style Evaluator**: The AI adaptively adjusts interview complexity based on user responses and domain experience.
- **Detailed Evaluation Report**: Generates granular feedback on communication skills, technical correctness, coding speed, and architectural suitability.
- **Apex Governor Limit Checks**: Evaluates code submissions and design plans for multi-tenant scalability and performance bottlenecks.
